title: ophrys cornuta var. stavri
intro: Ophrys cornuta var. stavri, also known as the 'Bee orchid', is a type of flowering orchid plant that is native to the Balkans and the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Ophrys cornuta var. stavri include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, and its ability to boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Ophrys cornuta var. stavri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions when taken in moderation.
